strategist.title: Strategy Genius
strategist.desc: You are a complete playmaker. With your timing of emails and your quiet but effective stance in meetings, you are the invisible manager of the plaza.

warrior.title: Crisis Management Expert
warrior.desc: If there's a fire, you're there. You're the one who keeps your cool even in the most stressful moments and brings the team to the harbor.

social.title: Networker / Social Butterfly
social.desc: You know best who has what trouble with whom, and the whispers by the coffee machine. You are that person everyone knows.

standard.title: Corporate Star
standard.desc: You have a balanced, professional, and adaptable nature to every situation. You are an indispensable part of plaza life.
